focus: 2-3 high-impact features: detail view, stats endpoint, filtering UI

tasks.title: Implement GET /api/agentmemory/{memory_id} endpoint
tasks.description: Add single memory detail endpoint. QA report identified this as BUG-01 blocking deep linking.

tasks.title: Create MemoryDetailView.vue with full memory display
tasks.description: New route /memory/:id showing full memory content, concepts, metadata. Click-through from MemoryCard.

tasks.title: Add type filter and sort controls to AgentMemoryView
tasks.description: Add dropdown for type filter (conversation/fact/procedure/etc) and sort order (updatedAt/createdAt/strength). Connect to existing paginated API.
